subject: [PATCH v4 05/21] mm/swap: add a new function to check if a swap entry is in swap cached.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new function, `is_swap_cached`, to check if a swap entry is in the swap cache. The function abstracts away the current implementation of directly checking the swap file's swap map and will soon be managed at the virtual swap layer.
